# Moon or Sun and Sun or Moon

This is two [Moon or Sun](https://puzz.link/rules.html?moonsun) puzzles in a single grid (or if you prefer, one Moon or Sun puzzle and one Sun or Moon puzzle). Additionally, the two loops may only cross each other if they both go straight through  the cell that they're crossing in.

Note: Penpa+ has a `Any color can match green line/edge in solution` toggle that may prove useful here.

[![Click to solve on Penpa+](../../images/puzzles/2025/moonSun1.png)](https://swaroopg92.github.io/penpa-edit/#m=solve&&)
